title: AI, Automation, and Your Career
modules: How Automation Has Always Changed Work
Which Tasks AI Does Best Today
Entrepreneurs Thriving in an AI Economy
Building a Career Strategy for Tomorrow
synopsis: This course moves beyond headlines to give learners a clear-eyed, evidence-based look at which jobs AI is realistically automating, which it is augmenting, and what workers and policymakers can do about it. Whether you are a student, a professional, or a lifelong learner, you will leave with a practical framework for navigating the changing world of work.
rationale: A demand score of 6/10 and corpus similarity of 0.61 against a single existing module on jobs reveals that learners need a full structured course — not just a lesson — to understand the nuanced economic and career implications of automation.
nearest_existing: What AI Actually Does to Jobs
